landingPage.subtitle:
Special Travel Experience
With Locals
landingPage.feature1Desc: Find unique travel experiences on the map
landingPage.feature3Desc: Chat and plan with hosts instantly
landingPage.review1Text: I discovered hidden local restaurants with local recommendations!
landingPage.review2Text: I was able to travel solo safely and enjoyably
landingPage.review3Text: I had special experiences not found in guidebooks
landingPage.getStartedDesc: Plan a special trip with free registration
landingPage.loginDesc: Start easily with Google account or email/password
landingPage.demoLoginSuccessDesc: Logged in as TEST account. Feel free to explore the platform!
landingPage.heroTagline: Your journey, written on the map
landingPage.heroDesc: Map-based timelines + trusted locals — turn every trip into a living story.
landingPage.discoverDesc: Find hidden spots, meet trusted locals, and capture every moment on your travel timeline.
landingPage.whyDesc: A new way to connect travelers and locals
landingPage.why1Bullets: See your entire journey on the map|Relive memories day by day, pin by pin|Shareable highlights for friends
landingPage.why2Bullets: Connect safely with trust levels|Get direct recommendations for hidden gems|Communicate without language barriers
landingPage.why3Bullets: Safe payments with escrow system|Dispute mediation support|Transparent fee policy
landingPage.timelineTitle: Your trip becomes a living timeline
landingPage.timelineDesc: Every check-in, photo, and local meet-up is stitched into a beautiful travel story. Relive your journeys day by day, pin by pin.
landingPage.timelineBullet1: Map-based view of your entire journey
landingPage.timelineBullet2: Safety check-ins and trusted contacts along the route
landingPage.timelineBullet3: Shareable highlights for friends and followers

article1.desc: Tired of getting off a tour bus, snapping one photo, and getting back on? Tourgether lets you experience hidden gems only locals know, authentic restaurants, and the real vibe of each city. Connect directly with local guides and plan your own customized journey.
article1.title: Say goodbye to cookie-cutter package tours

article2.desc: Want to travel solo but worried about eating alone or having no one to take your photos? Use our "Open to Meet" feature to find other travelers in the same area. Share meals, tours, and activities with like-minded people and say goodbye to the loneliness of solo travel.
article2.title: A connection platform for solo travelers

article3.desc: No one knows your city better than you. Become a local guide on Tourgether, offer unique experiences to travelers, and earn income. Register various services like food tours, photography services, shopping companions, and language interpretation.
article3.title: A sharing economy where locals can earn

article4.desc: Trade with confidence using our escrow-based payment system. Funds are securely held until service completion, and our dispute resolution system protects both parties. Find trustworthy partners easily through reviews and verified host badges.
article4.title: Safe P2P transaction system

article5.desc: Share your travel moments with photos on the feed and visualize your journey on a map-based timeline. Our AI-powered CineMap feature analyzes photo location data to automatically create cinematic travel storyboards. Easily look back on your memories even after your trip.
article5.title: Beautifully preserve your travel memories

seoSection.subtitle: A new way to rediscover the essence of travel
seoSection.title: Why Tourgether?
